purpose: A reusable architecture-governance layer for architecture construction, drift detection, decision candidates, proof gates, health findings, allowed/blocked actions, recovery views, and projection diagnostics.

current_state.default_registry_integration: complete for current bounded ACP governance rows

remaining_gaps: decision lifecycle workflow for accepted/deferred/rejected/superseded transitions
independent review gate application for future proof-heavy ACP milestones
optional RDF engine execution proof if later needed
optional SHACL engine validation proof if later needed
isolated git-lex alignment proof if later needed
non_claims: ACP fixtures and projections do not validate R035, R037, or R038.
ACP decision_candidate rows are not accepted decisions.
ACP proof_gate rows are not proof-gate satisfaction.
ACP projections do not prove product readiness, legal correctness, parser completeness, FalkorDB runtime loading, retrieval quality, or RDF/SHACL/SPARQL engine correctness.
